Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JOSE RAMIREZ, CANNON CONSTRUCTORS NORTH, INC. Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents is granted. Since no detailed declaration itemizing the time was submitted, the Request for Monetary Sanctions is denied. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Mark LeHocky; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
